semantic.role: Vitest acceptance test suite for validating the end-to-end demo governance workflow of the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Creates a temporary isolated test directory that replicates the demo project structure.
Copies necessary demo project source files and configuration into the test environment.
Executes the built ArchSpine CLI commands (sync, check, fix) using the test directory as the target.
Verifies the correctness of synchronization, architectural rule checking, and automated fix mechanisms.
outOfScope: Unit testing of individual services or engines.
Integration testing with external LLM APIs (uses MockClient).
invariants: Test file must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts per the test-file-suffix rule.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a comprehensive acceptance test for the demo governance workflow to ensure CLI commands (sync, check, fix) work correctly end-to-end.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Resolve lint errors and finalize pipeline fixes before v1.0, ensuring the acceptance tests are stable and reliable.

English.role: Vitest acceptance test suite for validating the end-to-end demo governance workflow of the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Creates a temporary isolated test directory that replicates the demo project structure.
Copies necessary demo project source files and configuration into the test environment.
Executes the built ArchSpine CLI commands (sync, check, fix) using the test directory as the target.
Verifies the correctness of synchronization, architectural rule checking, and automated fix mechanisms.
outOfScope: Unit testing of individual services or engines.
Integration testing with external LLM APIs (uses MockClient).

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于验证 ArchSpine 系统端到端演示治理工作流的 Vitest 验收测试套件。
responsibilities: 创建一个临时隔离的测试目录，复制演示项目结构。
将必要的演示项目源文件和配置复制到测试环境中。
使用测试目录作为目标，执行构建后的 ArchSpine CLI 命令（sync、check、fix）。
验证同步、架构规则检查和自动修复机制的正确性。
outOfScope: 单个服务或引擎的单元测试。
与外部 LLM API 的集成测试（使用 MockClient）。
